form.formComment: Entire back from a spell of four-and-a-half months. Has placed previously first up from a break. Finished off last preparation tenth of 13 at this track December 2 over 1400m, 14 len behind Waxing Moon carrying 56kg at $16.90. When resuming last campaign third of 11 at this track October 22 over 1600m, 5.5 len behind Kryptos with 56kg at $2.20. Don't dismiss lightly.
